productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Wedge Silver Sandal
description: Stylish to the T, this pair of sandals from carlton london is sure to make heads turn wherever you go. With just a single strap toe separator and a back strap, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe.Upper Single strap running from lateral ankle and ending as toe seprator for ample style and comfort Strap over big toe to lock the foot in place Backfoot strap with tang clasp to support the foot Straps made of soft synthetic leather for comfort and durability Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Smooth and mildly cushioned footbed for protection Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and stability High heel with kitten sole unit for style and durability shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
